titleStmt.title: SII 27.164: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 164. (A.R. No. 528 of 1928-29.) VARĀṄGA, KARKALA TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the northern verandah of the outer prākāra of the Nēmiśvara-basti.
This record, in Sanskrit and Kannaḍa language, is dated Śaka 1437, Bhāva, Māgha śu. 5, Friday, corresponding to 1515 A.D., January 19, Friday, f.d.t. ·35. The Śaka year, however, was current.

It states that Ratnappa-oḍeya who was governing the Tuḷu-rājya comprising of Bārakūru, Maṅgaḷūru and other areas, at the request of Dēvendrakīrtti-bhaṭṭāraka of Nandi-saṅgha, Balātkara-gaṇa and Sārasvatagachcha and under the orders of the king thereon, had the fallow lands in the village of Varāṅga, formerly donated to the Nēminātha temple by king Dēvarāya, cleared of the forests and Akkammaheggaḍati made over the same, along with all the fruit trees and others grown there, to the same temple Cf. No. 98 above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatparamagaṁbhīra syādvādāmōgha lāṁcha
naṁ . jīyāttrailōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ .
śrī mūlasaṁghējani naṁdisa ṁghastasminbalātkāra gaṇō ti
ramyaḥ . tatrāpi sārasatanāmni gacchē śrī kuṁḍakuṁdāryyamuni
rbabhūva . kēcittadvaṁśajātāḥ śāstraṁbhōnidhi pāra
gāḥ . paravādīcha paṁcāsyā Ācāryya padasaṁsthitāḥ . tatrā
pi samabhūdvādi vidyānaṁdāryya caṁdramāḥ paravādi mata
dhvāṁta dhunvan kaumuda mābhajan . vādīṁdraḥ samabhūtpa
ṭṭē tadīyē dharmavardhakaḥ . mahaṁmada suritrāṇa dattayā vā
divaibhavaḥ . vidyānaṁdō munīṁdrō bhūttatpaṭṭē viśrutēbhuvi . śrutakē
valivatsākṣāllōkaṁ dharmaprakāśayan . bhāti bhaṭṭārakō dha
rmma bhūṣaṇō guṇabhūṣaṇaḥ . yadyaśaḥ kusumāmādau
gaganaṁ bhramarāyatē . tacchiṣyō varddhamānākhyō bhaṭṭāraka pa
dānkitaḥ . pādapādīśvaraḥ sthānē babhūva viduṣāmsatāṁ .
paṭṭadvayaṁ samāsādya rājatētitarāṁ mahān . dēvēṁdrakīrtti
yatipō nēminātha prasādataḥ . tadupadēśādēvaṁ jātaṁ . * .
svastiśrī manmahā rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa kṛṣṇadēvarā
ya mahārāyara nirūpadiṁda paścima samudrādhīśvara ratnappa Oḍeyaru
bārakūra maṁgalūru modalāda tuḷurājyavanu pratipālisutaṁ yiddaṁdina
śakavarṣa 1437 neya bhāva saṁvatsarada māgha śuddha 5 śukravāradalu śrī vīrapratā .
pa kṛṣṇadēvarāya mahārāyara bhaṁḍārakke mudurādiya Akkamma pe
rggaḍati Ā tirumasāvaṁta Ā maludēvi Appaya sēnabōva Ayinūṟa sā .
viradavarū modalādavaru OtuOḍaṁbaṭṭu poḍavaṭṭu koṭṭa sāda
nada kramayeṁteṁdaḍe pūrvvadalli varddhamāna bhaṭṭārakācāryyara Upadēśa
diṁda śrīvīra pratāpa dēvarāya mahārāyaru varāṁgasthānada śrī
nēminātha dēvara Aṁgaraṁgabhōgakke Alliyiha ®ṣisamudāyada Ā
hāradānakke śāsanāṁkitavāgi biṭṭukoṭṭa Ā varāṁga sthānadalli na
ṁma hiriyaru Ajñānadōṣadiṁda Ā varāṁgada catussīme yoḷage kāḍanu
beḷasidda kāraṇa Ā dharmada vṛttikṣētragaḷu naṣṭavāda saṁbaṁda śrīmaddēvēṁ
drakīrtti bhaṭṭāraka dēvarugaḷu śrī vīra pratāpa kṛṣṇadēvarāya mahārāya
rige dharma prasaṁgavāgalāgi śrī vīrapratāpa kṛṣṇadēvarāya mahārā
yara nirūpadiṁda ratnappa Oḍeyaru vicārisalāgi nāunaṁma svaruciyiṁda Ā
kāḍanu kaḍiyisi pūrvvaśāsana pramāṇinalli Ā dharmadasīmeyanu biṭṭukoṭṭeU
Ā sīmegaḷoḷage naṭṭa halasu māu teṁgu Āḍake Oṭe muṁtādavēnu yiddaru nīve
bāḷuviralade namage Ā maragaḷa saṁbaṁdha villa Ā varāṁga sthānada catussī
me yoḷage Ārthārthavṛtti saṁbaṁdha yilaveṁdu śrī vīrapratāpa kṛṣṇa
dēvarāya mahārāyara bhaṁḍārakke mudurādiya Akkammaheggaḍati muṁttāda
varu taṁmasvarujiyiṁda Oḍaṁbaṭṭu koṭṭa sādana yiṁnu nāunaṁmma vaṁśadalli
huṭṭidavaru Ī sādhanakke tappidaru tathātithi yiṁdahinde Ayivattuvaruṣada
hīnāyada hoṁnanu rāyara bhaṁḍārakke teṟuveU rāyara siṁhāsanakke
tappidavaru rāyara harivāṇakke siṁgiyanikkidavaru naṁmavaṁśavanu
nāvē kayimuṭṭi koṁdavaru naṁma Iṣṭa daivavanu bhaṁgavamāḍidavaru yi
sādhanakke sākṣigaḷu kelavasiya bhairarasa Oḍeyaru . bārakūra yeraḍu
kēriya halaru . saṁkuheggaḍeyaru yiruva tūra vasaṁtaru teṁka
nāḍu baḍaganāḍu muṁtādavaru samakṣadalli baradukoṭṭa yi sā
dhanakke tappidare yisākṣiyavare naṁmanu nilusuvudakke naṁmau
bhaya . bhayirasavoriyara voppa śrī vītarāga Eraḍukēri hala
ra voppa . saṁkuheggeḍe voppa teṁkanāḍa baḍaganāḍa voppa .
yiruvattura vasaṁtana voppa . mudurādiya tirumasāvaṁta voppa
Digital edition of SII 27.164 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
